title: schizachyrium scoparium
intro: Schizachyrium scoparium, also known as Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizachyrium scoparium include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Schizachyrium scoparium is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes.
